Allure Winner
Each year, thousands of products are tested by Allure beauty editors and a panel of industry experts, including makeup artists, hairstylists, and dermatologists. When you see the Allure Best of Beauty seal, it means that a product has been rigorously tested and identified as exceptional in its category. It's not just a high-quality product, but a true standout in the beauty world.

Learn more about ClimeCo Certified

ClimeCo Certified

ClimeCo certifies products whose carbon emissions have been assessed, verified, decarbonized, and are on a committed path towards continual emissions reductions. Companies may pursue emissions reductions for products through various means such as sustainable manufacturing practices, supply chain sustainability, raw materials innovation, renewable energy use, insetting, sustainable transportation and packaging.

Cradle to Cradle Certified

Cradle to Cradle certified products are made with safer materials and responsible processes based on meeting science-based requirements including health and well-being, material reuse, emissions reductions, water quality, and fair and safe labour practices. The Cradle to Cradle Certified Product Standard is set by the Cradle to Cradle Products Innovation Institute.
